vibe: Cinematic, brutalist, eye-watering, high-end luxury, editorial-meets-tech

narrative_emphasis.usage: Use for the manifesto, specific keywords in the hero, and elegant contrast in section headers.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Aggressive asymmetry, massive negative space, bento grids with empty cells.

grid_modes.hero: Full viewport height (100vh), centered absolute elements with floating technical labels on corners.
grid_modes.portfolio: Tetris grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12), wide gaps (gap-12), spanning columns unevenly.
grid_modes.tiers: 3-column grid (md:grid-cols-3) but styled with progressive visual weight (Echo is minimalist, Aether has blur/morph boundaries, Cosmos has 3D depth/glow).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-8, p-12, p-24, p-32. Containers with borders MUST use p-8 minimum.

surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glass variant (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10). Sticky/fixed at top.

cards.echo: Flat background (#0A0A0A), 1px solid border (border-white/10), no shadow.
cards.aether: Tracing Beam variant (animated gradient border using framer-motion), subtle white ambient glow.
cards.cosmos: Glassmorphism with heavy backdrop-blur, nested borders, floating 3D elements inside.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: MANDATORY: Use `lenis` for smooth scrolling. Momentum and weight are critical for luxury feel.
motion_and_interaction.cursor: Custom cursor: large white inverted circle (mix-blend-difference) that expands on interactive elements.
motion_and_interaction.reveals: Scroll-driven animations (Framer Motion). Staggered text reveals (line by line masking).
motion_and_interaction.background: Dynamic noise/grain texture overlay fixed to viewport (opacity 0.03).
motion_and_interaction.3d_elements: Use React Three Fiber/Spline for the hero object and Cosmos card. Alternative: highly complex Framer Motion paths with morphing SVG blobs for Aether.

components_to_build.Hero: Cinematic full-screen black void. Huge 'KYNTHIA' text intersecting with a 3D fluid/metallic shape or abstract WebGL particle system. Scroll down indicator.
components_to_build.Manifesto: Massive typography section mixing Cabinet Grotesk and Cormorant Garamond. Scroll-triggered opacity reveals.
components_to_build.TierShowcase: Three cards mapping to ECHO, AETHER, COSMOS. Each card's animation intensity scales up. Cosmos must include a mini WebGL canvas or intensive morphing.
components_to_build.PortfolioGrid: Asymmetric bento grid with high-contrast B&W project mockups. Hover effect: image desaturates/distorts slightly, title appears.
components_to_build.ProcessTimeline: Vertical scrolling line with technical monospace nodes.
components_to_build.ContactForm: Brutalist minimal form. Huge input fields, bottom border only. 'Request a Quote' CTA with magnetic hover effect.

hero_texture.description: Abstract black and white geometry for hero background texture

noise_overlay.description: White noise/grain texture for overlay mapping

assets.icons: lucide-react for UI interactions. Keep icons extremely minimal and thin stroke-width (1px).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG standards. Off-white text on black must be highly readable.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, forms, and tier cards MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='tier-card-cosmos'`, `data-testid='quote-submit-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lenis (@studio-freight/lenis) for smooth scroll, framer-motion for animations.
Create a global noise overlay (`pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay opacity-5`) to give the whole site a film grain texture.
Implement a custom magnetic cursor using framer-motion.

For the Hero section, if WebGL/Three.js is too complex for the current setup, use Framer Motion to create an intricate, slowly rotating/morphing abstract SVG or high-res blurred blobs that simulate a 3D environment.

Design the 3 tiers (ECHO, AETHER, COSMOS) with distinct visual rule-sets. ECHO is static and crisp. AETHER introduces blur and morphing borders. COSMOS should be heavily animated with glowing particle effects or 3D floating elements.

Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections. Use Shadcn ONLY for the Contact form inputs and dropdowns, but heavily customize them to remove any 'default SaaS' look (make them brutalist with border-b only, no outline).
Font imports: Cabinet Grotesk (from Fontshare), Cormorant Garamond, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono (from Google Fonts).
